reason: The provided frames show a TUDelft institutional setting with FLS trainer equipment visible, but no actual task performance is discernible. The frames appear to be static or near-identical documentation shots of the trainer setup without observable task execution, instrument manipulation, or measurable completion phases. No suturing, cutting, knot tying, peg transfer, or loop deployment is visible in any frame. The camera angle is primarily external showing the trainer apparatus and trainee positioning rather than endoscopic/internal task view necessary for FLS scoring.
recommendation: Request video that captures actual task performance with internal/endoscopic camera feed or clear external documentation of task execution phases.
